_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in transcribing target language communications.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in fine-tuning pre-trained language models for domain-specific tasks, including dataset preparation, training configuration, and evaluation design.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-S-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-012 (AI, cosine: 0.510), OP-S-004 (OP, cosine: 0.440).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.2/10 (raw 0.318). Shared vocabulary: [language, skill]. DCWF-only terms [communications, target, transcribing] vs WIDAI-only terms [configuration, dataset, design, domain, evaluation, fine] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.905, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.050 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in transcribing target language communications." and "Skill in fine-tuning pre-trained language models for domain-specific tasks, incl". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.515 > STS 0.318 (gap +0.197). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [language, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.0%. Shared tokens: [language, skill]. DCWF-only: [communications, target, transcribing]. WIDAI-only: [configuration, dataset, design, domain, evaluation, fine].
